/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -Wall -g CMakeFiles/call_user_service.dir/call_user_service.cpp.o -o /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/bin/call_user_service  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libuser_rpc.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libsaier_rpc.so -lprotobuf -lzookeeper_mt /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libload_config.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libserv.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libthreadpool.so /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/liblogger.so -lpthread /home/zxc/MProj/se_rpc/lib/libtimestamp.so
